explicit_text: I used to row down Bayou Bartholomew near a place called Free Nigger Bend, where only Negro families farmed. There was an old house back in the bend, used by one of the farmers to store cotton. Me and my friend John would go there to get sugar cane from a nearby patch and lay around on the cotton bales telling ghost stories. One time, we heard knocking on the back wall and thought it was a ghost, but it turned out to be a huge black snake banging its tail. After that, we never went back to that old house for stories or sugar cane.
implicit_text: I used to row down a long, winding waterway near a place called Free Nigger Bend, where only Negro families farmed. There was an old house back in the bend, used by one of the farmers to store cotton. Me and my friend John would go there to get sugar cane from a nearby patch and lay around on the cotton bales telling ghost stories. One time, we heard knocking on the back wall and thought it was a ghost, but it turned out to be a huge black snake banging its tail. After that, we never went back to that old house for stories or sugar cane.

explicit_text: Old Master never gave his slaves fresh meat, only old salt pork, even though he had plenty of hogs. He kept a close watch on his hog pens to prevent slaves from stealing pigs. One old slave named Flowers managed to get fresh meat sometimes, despite the risk. There was a story where Flowers tried to carry a hog home but it woke up and escaped just before Master arrived. Salt pork was the usual fare, but Flowers longed for fresh meat and sometimes risked punishment to get it.
implicit_text: Old Master never gave his slaves fresh meat, only old salted pork, even though he had plenty of hogs. He kept a close watch on his hog pens to prevent slaves from stealing pigs. One old slave named Flowers managed to get fresh meat sometimes, despite the risk. There was a story where Flowers tried to carry a hog home but it woke up and escaped just before Master arrived. Salted pork was the usual fare, but Flowers longed for fresh meat and sometimes risked punishment to get it.

explicit_text: When old slave Flowers was caught carrying a hog, he acted innocent as the Lamb of God, pretending he was just chopping cordwood. That phrase stuck with me because it showed how he tried to stay calm and innocent in a tough situation. Flowers believed God was with him that day, helping him avoid punishment. But despite his faith, he still got caught and punished later for stealing fresh meat. The Lamb of God image captures his quiet, humble way of facing danger and authority.
implicit_text: When old slave Flowers was caught carrying a hog, he acted innocent like a meek and humble figure, pretending he was just chopping cordwood. That phrase stuck with me because it showed how he tried to stay calm and innocent in a tough situation. Flowers believed God was with him that day, helping him avoid punishment. But despite his faith, he still got caught and punished later for stealing fresh meat. The meek and humble image captures his quiet, humble way of facing danger and authority.
